rationale: Removes two dead lines from internal/application/aianalysis/service.go inside Service.AnalyzeHotwords: a json.Marshal(t) call whose result is immediately discarded into _ = tags, and the now-unused encoding/json import that only existed for that dead code. The PR body explicitly states the change is zero-behavioral (the removed statements had no effect) and that go vet was run locally. The diff matches the description and removes only the dead lines; the surrounding loop body that actually computes word frequencies is untouched.
